title: lichen-desktop: Desktop GUI application
description:
Cross-platform desktop application for LICHEN.

Framework options:
- Tauri (Rust backend, web frontend) - smaller, faster, preferred
- Electron (if web tech sharing with mobile is priority)

Features:
- Contact list with presence indicators
- Message threads (1:1 and group)
- Map view with peer positions (OpenStreetMap/Leaflet)
- Waypoint management with map interaction
- Node configuration panel
- Key/trust management with fingerprint verification
- System tray with notifications

Implementation:
- Tauri v2 + SvelteKit or React
- CoAP over IPC to local node
- SQLite for local message cache
- Platform-native notifications

Targets: Windows, macOS, Linux.
